valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Sat 18 Apr 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Sun 19 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low Faeroes 995 expected Norwegian Sea 1007 by midnight tonight. High 300 miles west of FitzRoy 1027, expected Shannon with little change by same time
